title: ctenitis propinqua
intro: Ctenitis propinqua is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the oak fern. Native to China, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis propinqua include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Ctenitis propinqua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
